ULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    warmup_steps = min(max(1, total_steps // 10), 50)\\n\\n    def lr_lambda(step_idx: int) -> float:\\n        if step_idx < warmup_steps:\\n            return float(step_idx + 1) / float(warmup_steps)\\n        progress = (step_idx - warmup_steps) / float(max(1, total_steps - warmup_steps))\\n        return 0.1 + 0.9 * 0.5 * (1.0 + np.cos(np.pi * progress))\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda=lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed-step budget effectively by enabling a warmup+cosine LR schedule tied to TRAIN_MAX_STEPS; this should improve optimization quality within 256 steps without adding architectural complexity.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"topk\"]}"}}
